about.title: About me
about.paragraph1: For 10 years I have focused mainly on web development and worked with various technologies. I started in frontend development, learning HTML, CSS, and JavaScript and taking my first steps with frameworks such as Bootstrap, jQuery, and Vue. Even back then I took small steps into backend technologies such as PHP, Python, and Go, and databases such as MySQL.
about.paragraph2: Over time and through new possibilities in web development, I grew into a fullstack developer and today I prefer working with Next.js, React, and TypeScript.
